bird.name: Eastern clapper lark
bird.summary: The eastern clapper lark (Corypha fasciolata) is a small passerine bird which breeds in southern Africa. It derives its name from the wing…

locations.name: Tswalu Kalahari Reserve
locations.summary: The Tswalu Kalahari Reserve is a privately owned game reserve in the Northern Cape, South Africa.

locations.name: Carl Jakob Sundevall
locations.summary: Carl Jakob Sundevall (22 October 1801 – 2 February 1875) was a Swedish zoologist.
